name: Ren: The Girl with the Mark
original_name: Ren: The Girl with the Mark
overview: Ren is a young woman who, after a strange encounter in the woods, is marked by an ancient spirit. Cast out from her small village, she is forced to leave behind the family she has spent her whole life protecting and journey across the land to find the real meaning behind the mark she now bears.

trailers.title: Full Premiere Q&A Session - Ren: The Girl with the Mark
